name: 家园（Home Land）
short_description: Running into the realm that once destroyed your homeland is mysterious and dangerous, but you can only get real redemption if you have revenge in your eyes, survive and kill them out!
detailed_description:
In the game world of Home, your home (Fuzhou, Fujian Province) was once ravaged by the beasts of god. Although the destroyed home has been rebuilt, you still want to accumulate strength and blade those beasts of god, but you can't find the source of strength, so you have to look around all the time. Finally, one day you found a treasure house in Guling, East China by chance. Maybe there is something you need in it. Things.
In the follow-up updates, I will enter the city of Fuzhou, experience some stories, and appreciate the flavor of Fuzhou.
